title: Yarlan
description: Yarlan is a 16× RPG resource pack for servers: cohesive weapons & armor, custom mob/BOSS visuals, accessories, crops, and skill icons/UI. Activates on mc.aelris.cn (Java 1.21.1). First load may take a few minutes.
body:
🔹 Full Description
Important — Server delivery & activation

This pack is server-delivered and activates when you join: mc.aelris.cn (Java 1.21.1). Because it includes many models and textures, the first download may take a few minutes—please keep the game open until the download finishes.
What is Yarlan?

Yarlan (亚尔兰) is an RPG-focused resource pack built for multiplayer servers. It ships no code and doesn’t change gameplay logic; instead, it provides a cohesive visual set for weapons, armor, mobs/BOSSes, accessories, crops, and skill/HUD icons so your RPG experience looks polished and readable.
Key features

![Crops & harvest items with themed growth stages and icons.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a3885fd8b36fcc07a520e638ca5ceeec4b05c65.png)
![Mob & BOSS visuals tailored for dungeons/raids—distinct silhouettes and colors; AI remains unchanged.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68ceac338568cfe451371901f82f70702c2551eb_0.webp)![Skill icons & UI accents for professions, statuses, rarity cues, and event markers.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7670c98a8b58a12ff90e175632fda49116d517f.png)![RPG weapons & armor with a vanilla-like voxel style for clarity and identity.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/baceca8f2422b7066e37642b017cb2792eb09e0e.png)
Accessories & trinkets such as rings, necklaces, medals—clean inventory icons for item systems.
Why use it?

A unified RPG look improves readability in quests, dungeons, and events, and it’s great for streaming or highlight videos. As a server-delivered 16× pack, it loads fast on most clients while keeping visuals coherent across weapons, mobs, crops, and UI.
Compatibility

Minecraft Java: 1.21.1 (targeted)
Dependencies: none; works on vanilla clients
Installation & activation

Simply join the server mc.aelris.cn and accept the server resource pack prompt. If you stack multiple packs locally, place Yarlan on top to ensure its models and textures are visible. Note: custom item models/icons appear as intended only on the server that binds them (mc.aelris.cn).
Notes for first-time users

Because the pack is relatively large, the first load may take several minutes depending on your network. Please do not exit the game during the download. After the first install, subsequent joins will be faster due to caching.
